title: Overpass-the-Hash via Rubeus asktgt
description: Detects overpass-the-hash (pass-the-key), where a stolen NTLM hash or AES key is used with Rubeus 'asktgt' to request a fresh TGT, converting an NTLM hash into full Kerberos access. Indicators: asktgt with /rc4, /aes256, or /des and a /user + /domain.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*asktgt*' and 'Command Line' like '*/user:*')) and (('Command Line' like '*/rc4:*' or 'Command Line' like '*/aes256:*' or 'Command Line' like '*/aes128:*' or 'Command Line' like '*/des:*' or 'Command Line' like '*/ntlm:*')))
